# **hacks-a-thon**

[@Joe Moore](https://seven2.slack.com/team/UKNLQKWMA) created this channel on February 18th. This is the very beginning of the **hacks-a-thon** channel.

**Joe Moore**  [10:59 AM](https://seven2.slack.com/archives/C0AF9NEC2SK/p1771433996456969)  
joined \#hacks-a-thon. Also, murto joined.  
**murto**  [11:04 AM](https://seven2.slack.com/archives/C0AF9NEC2SK/p1771434273787729)  
Okay all hacks (that’s you **@channel**)\! This is where ’s do our hacks-a-thon planning\! For now, if you’d like to learn a little bit more about lovable, you can go here: [https://docs.lovable.dev/introduction/welcome](https://docs.lovable.dev/introduction/welcome)  
There’s a decent overview, but there’s also navigation to some of their how-to videos  
**Lovable Documentation**  
[**Welcome to Lovable \- Lovable Documentation**](https://docs.lovable.dev/introduction/welcome)  
Lovable is a full-stack AI development platform for building, iterating on, and deploying web applications using natural language, with real code, security, and enterprise governance.  
[https://docs.lovable.dev/introduction/welcome](https://docs.lovable.dev/introduction/welcome)  
[11:06](https://seven2.slack.com/archives/C0AF9NEC2SK/p1771434401565489)  
Plus, there are some great videos here: [https://docs.lovable.dev/introduction/video-tutorials](https://docs.lovable.dev/introduction/video-tutorials)  
**Lovable Documentation**  
[**Video tutorials \- Lovable Documentation**](https://docs.lovable.dev/introduction/video-tutorials)  
Watch step-by-step tutorials for building calorie trackers, CRMs, feedback tools, landing pages, and AI-powered apps with Lovable.  
[https://docs.lovable.dev/introduction/video-tutorials](https://docs.lovable.dev/introduction/video-tutorials)  
**aaron**  [11:07 AM](https://seven2.slack.com/archives/C0AF9NEC2SK/p1771434423545469)  
was added to \#hacks-a-thon by Joe Moore. Also, alliyah and 16 others joined.  
**Tyler**  [2:19 PM](https://seven2.slack.com/archives/C0AF9NEC2SK/p1771445942136649)  
Let's goooooooo\!\!\!  
**murto**  [4:23 PM](https://seven2.slack.com/archives/C0AF9NEC2SK/p1771453419815049)  
Okay **@channel** It’s time to start our Hacks-a-Thon\! I’m going to do a kick off tomorrow at Status, and over the next few days [@callen](https://seven2.slack.com/team/UNJLM5DPS) will be time blocking your calendars with dedicated hacks-a-time, so be sure they are up to date.  
I’m sure you have a lot of questions, and I will try to cover most of them tomorrow at Status. Also I am available anytime to chat. Soon I will be sending you an invite to Lovable, which is the platform we bought a subscription to to help us do this vibe coding. You don’t need to do anything at this time in it, but it could be helpful if you log in and create your account.  
I’ve created an outline for the experience, so if you want, click around and you can get a rough idea of the plan\! I can’t wait to explain it all in further details shortly\!  
[https://hacks.murtopolis.com](https://hacks.murtopolis.com/)  
**hacks.murtopolis.com**  
[**The Seven2 Hacks-a-Thon**](https://hacks.murtopolis.com/)  
We're all just hacks. And that's kind of the point. A focused, time-blocked experiment to help everyone at Seven2 learn how to build with AI.  
[https://hacks.murtopolis.com/](https://hacks.murtopolis.com/)  
**murto**  [1:20 PM](https://seven2.slack.com/archives/C0AF9NEC2SK/p1771528832936159)  
In case you missed it, here’s the kick-off meeting recorded video: [https://drive.google.com/file/d/1Za7z2A\_\_MZd2PFM6PfiB9t8U9Ip-g2PN/view?usp=sharing](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1Za7z2A__MZd2PFM6PfiB9t8U9Ip-g2PN/view?usp=sharing)  
**murto**  [1:38 PM](https://seven2.slack.com/archives/C0AF9NEC2SK/p1771529898357339)  
**@channel** Okay, I just added you all to my Lovable workspace\! You should be receiving an email that would allow you to log in. Take a look and let me know if that doesn’t work\!  
[1:39](https://seven2.slack.com/archives/C0AF9NEC2SK/p1771529989168849)  
Also, I mentioned my side project Zero.Prmptr, which can help you walk through creating some of the documentation that will help you out. Feel free to use it, but do not feel like you have to\! [Zero.Prmptr.ai](http://zero.prmptr.ai/) (Yeah, of course I made that vibe coding ha)  
**og.kelsea**  [1:45 PM](https://seven2.slack.com/archives/C0AF9NEC2SK/p1771530324830489)  
Looks like that worked\! I know we’re tracking non billable time a little differently now, but do you want us to track our time toward this project in Wrike at all?  
**murto**  [1:47 PM](https://seven2.slack.com/archives/C0AF9NEC2SK/p1771530449167549)  
**@channel** Thanks to Joe Moore for the reminder that we do have full access to [https://gemini.google.com/app](https://gemini.google.com/app) as part of our G Suite subscription \- it’s the pro level, so feel free to use that for any ideation that you might need.  
**Gemini**  
[**Google Gemini**](https://gemini.google.com/app)  
Meet Gemini, Google’s AI assistant. Get help with writing, planning, brainstorming, and more. Experience the power of generative AI.  
[https://gemini.google.com/app](https://gemini.google.com/app)

[@carlosl](https://seven2.slack.com/team/UNLJ261C6) I was just thinking about yours. Could be too deep of a feature and disrupt the creative process you still want to own BUT was thinking it could be cool if there was some kind of recommendation system based on your pool of existing lines/pieces. hey **@channel**, I can't remember if we mentioned this or not but just in case, reiterating it here \- we're going t have you track your time for this project even though its not billable. Since we're actively working towards milestones and carving time out of our client/billable work. So if you could make sure you track your time for yesterdays, call that would be great. We went about an hour for the presentations. I've added a card for each milestone and you can bill your time accordingly. Holler with questions\!

**murto**  [3:30 PM](https://seven2.slack.com/archives/C0AF9NEC2SK/p1773693048426439)  
**@channel** Unrelated side note: one of my favorite tricks is to start something in ChatGPT \- specifically, this AgencyOS idea that I’ve been working on for a few months (it’s a CRM platform for small agencies like S2). I started it with chatGPT, gone back and forth with it, fleshed it out till I got it into a good spot, and then I fed the entire thing into Claude and used it to do some deep research and thinking. It produces such better and such smarter output\!  
Honestly, I love ChatGPT for its creativity, but also I feel like it’s always blowing smoke up my ass. (But also, if you’re ever feeling down, go have a talk with ChatGPT, and they will put you on a pedestal, and you will feel like the smartest person in the room\! haha) Claude Opus 4.6 is so much more realistic. It tells me the things I’m not doing well and is generally less of a people pleaser. But I love the combo of getting two separate LLMs thinking on the same problem\! ![:facepunch::skin-tone-2:][image6]  
**murto**  [3:32 PM](https://seven2.slack.com/archives/C0AF9NEC2SK/p1773693156531949)  
Also, I’m moving the IdeaLab outside of Lovable right now, so it’s going to be down for a little bit. I will let you know when it’s back up and running  
**murto**  [5:30 PM](https://seven2.slack.com/archives/C0AF9NEC2SK/p1773700234328479)  
**@channel** \- [IdeaLab.seven2.com](http://idealab.seven2.com/) is now officially moved off of lovable and live\! I’ve added a couple of features, such as:

* You should be able to edit all of your project’s information now.  
* You can add a URL at any time, no matter what your project stage is.

 3\. You can now add up to three supporting screenshots if you like  
Also, were some weird errors I noticed from before where I could actually generate AI docs on other people’s ideas, not just your own. So now everything is locked down to where you can only edit and update and generate docs for your own ideas.  
**callen**  [6:24 PM](https://seven2.slack.com/archives/C0AF9NEC2SK/p1773703461072599)  
**@channel** who wants to present their hack on Wednesday?\!

**aaron**  [8:31 PM](https://seven2.slack.com/archives/C0AF9NEC2SK/p1773711090987319)  
![:trophy:][image7] to the 240 credit user  
**murto**  [7:47 AM](https://seven2.slack.com/archives/C0AF9NEC2SK/p1773751679553549)  
Good morning **@channel** \- Okay, so I started going down a rabbit hole around the idea of uploading the three preview images in the IdeaLab. I’m my own worst client\!  
I’ve added a new feature so that the first image listed out of the three is going to be your hero image and will show as a 16x10 ratio teaser image in the main gallery.  
When you upload an image or click in the gallery, you have a crop highlighter tool in case your image is at a different ratio. You can slide the crop tool up and down to highlight your selection, and you’ll have a teaser preview image shown based on that.  
Lastly, you can drag to reorder your uploaded images too. Enjoy\! ![:facepunch::skin-tone-2:][image8]  
**callen**  [1:05 PM](https://seven2.slack.com/archives/C0AF9NEC2SK/p1773857112996919)  
**@channel** [here's](https://83d7f97f-ddd6-434a-98dc-b37339a6a817.lovableproject.com/story/04be4f72-17ee-4ed7-a576-8d7769173069) the story we created together\!  
![:sparkles:][image9] "The Sparkle Meadow Secret Garden" — a bedtime story for Drew & Dawsom ![:sparkles:][image10]  
Travel atop a gentle unicorn through a garden of glowing flowers and soft whispers to a land of velvet dreams.  
*(don't tell Daws i spelt her name wrong... ![:slightly\_smiling\_face:][image11])*  
**Lovable**  
[**Lovable \- Build for the web 20x faster**](https://83d7f97f-ddd6-434a-98dc-b37339a6a817.lovableproject.com/story/04be4f72-17ee-4ed7-a576-8d7769173069)  
Build software products, using only a chat interface.  
[https://83d7f97f-ddd6-434a-98dc-b37339a6a817.lovableproject.com/story/04be4f72-17ee-4ed7-a576-8d7769173069](https://83d7f97f-ddd6-434a-98dc-b37339a6a817.lovableproject.com/story/04be4f72-17ee-4ed7-a576-8d7769173069)

**callen**  [2:11 PM](https://seven2.slack.com/archives/C0AF9NEC2SK/p1773861118710729)  
also for you parents (great suggestion [@aaron](https://seven2.slack.com/team/UMN5NEM2S)\!) I added the ability for you to create an account so you can get in there and play around, change themes, etc. AND added the option for "Kid profiles" so you don't have to type out the same kid information over and over if you're a repeat visitor.  
CleanShot 2026-03-18 at 12.08.43@2x.png   
CleanShot 2026-03-18 at 12.08.43@2x.png

**callen**  [9:57 AM](https://seven2.slack.com/archives/C0AF9NEC2SK/p1774277861397579)  
Hey **@channel**\! Wanting to make sure i have the final group of people correct before scheduling the last showcase session \- if you still need to present and aren't on my list below, will you slack me?\! Thank you\!  
**Here's who still needs to go according to my list:**

* Carlos  
* Alliyah  
* Adam  
* Nick  
* Kelsea  
* Bri

LMK\!  
**murto**  [9:57 PM](https://seven2.slack.com/archives/C0AF9NEC2SK/p1774321069283429)  
**@channel** As we get close to winding down the Hacks-a-Thon, I have three more things for each of you\!

* **Be sure to upload an image** or two in the IdeaLab that goes along with your project? It could be a screenshot or any other art that you want to create for it.  
* **Please go and fill out this questionnaire**. I just want to be able to improve the Hacks-a-Thon so that I can maybe convince some other companies to give it a shot. The URL for the questionnaire is [here](https://hacks.murtopolis.com/reflect), and the password is: seven2reflect  
* **The Hacky Awards:** As soon as we have our last presentation, I will send out the voting link and pw for the Hacky Awards\! (Or should it be called the Hackies?)

This has been super fun, and I’m so excited about every project that you all did\!  
**hacks.murtopolis.com**  
[**Reflect — The Seven2 Hacks-a-Thon**](https://hacks.murtopolis.com/reflect)  
Share your reflections from the Seven2 Hacks-a-Thon.  
**alliyah**  [11:01 AM](https://seven2.slack.com/archives/C0AF9NEC2SK/p1774368102961399)  
[@murto](https://seven2.slack.com/team/URKJ84RPA) what's the passcode for reflections? ![:blush:][image21]  
**murto**  [10:00 AM](https://seven2.slack.com/archives/C0AF9NEC2SK/p1774537219707019)  
**@channel** As I just received another invoice from lovable, it means we have another month’s worth of usage\! (go play if you want\!) **My question to all of you is**, going forward, **do you see yourself using lovable very much?** I’d love to hear people’s thoughts on this. I believe we can also transfer your projects to personal accounts for you if that works too, or maybe we can just reduce our monthly spend going forward and keep the business account going. I’m just brainstorming here.

**murto**  [5:14 PM](https://seven2.slack.com/archives/C0AF9NEC2SK/p1774908879077079)  
Your vote counts **@channel**\! Voting is now open\! Please visit [https://hacks.murtopolis.com/vote](https://hacks.murtopolis.com/vote) (pw: seven2hacks) It’ll only run till EOD Tues (tomorrow) \- Also, I took myself out of the running since I didn’t officially follow the rules lol  
Also, make sure you update the screenshot in your IdeaLab post. I noticed that a handful of you don’t have yours in there yet. Also, if you need to make any changes to your IdeaLab post, now is a good time to do that. [https://idealab.seven2.com/](https://idealab.seven2.com/)  
Lastly, only half of you have filled out the survey. Just a reminder, it is here: [https://hacks.murtopolis.com/reflect](https://hacks.murtopolis.com/reflect) (pw: seven2reflect)  
This has been such a fun experiment, thanks again, everybody\!  
**hacks.murtopolis.com**

Dream it. Drop it. Watch it grow. Seven2's experimental playground for AI innovation where wild ideas meet brilliant minds.  
[https://idealab.seven2.com/](https://idealab.seven2.com/)
